_note: EN-id -> JA label. Source: PHB 2024 Japanese edition (Hobby Japan). Primary katakana names per official D&D Japan glossary (dnd-jp.com/DnD_Glossary_JP.txt). New 2024-only terms sourced from Brother Sharp (note.com/brothersharp). 3 terms without confirmed JA (befuddlement, arcane-vigor, power-word-fortify) use convention-based katakana.
